title: Register for monday Evolve in LA!

posts.author: bridget.monday (Bridget P.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Calling all LA-based monday.com enthusiasts! Explore how leaders and innovators are unlocking the potential of AI to boost productivity, reimagine workflows, and create a more connected workplace. Through hands-on workshops, an in-depth customer story, and inspiring keynotes, you’ll walk away with practical strategies and new perspectives to drive impact every day.

Learn from industry leaders
Hear from top voices shaping the future of work. Discover strategies and insights you can quickly put into action.

Develop real expertise
Sharpen your skills with interactive sessions led by experts. Tackle real challenges and walk away with practical tools.

Connect over cocktails
End the day by joining your peers at happy hour. Build relationships, share ideas, and expand your professional network.

Register here!
